waiver: none-by-design:Evidence is required whenever a PR is system-affecting; the only skip path is the narrow single-file non-governance exemption, which is a structural classification computed from the diff, not a manual waiver a PR author can invoke.
notes: Coverage includes clean-artifact pass, missing/dummy/stale-SHA artifact rejection, unavailability-marker tolerance, artifact-in-diff rejection, friction-signal learning-loop routing (missing/generic/concrete reason, real/missing/incomplete lesson file, both-fields-present), the narrow single-file governance-path exemption boundary, and the selected_result_loop_contract dimension (derived-valid, declared-valid, missing/ambiguous, unknown-id, placeholder, declared-unrelated-to-diff-candidates, stale-artifact-missing-key, and PR-body-prose-cannot-override-artifact cases). The sibling generator utility (derivation/declared-field logic, empty-run not_required path) has its own fixture coverage in scripts/enforcement/tests/test-collect-pr-work-history.sh.
